title: ADCS ESC1: Subject Alternative Name Abuse via Certipy/Certify
description: Detects ADCS ESC1 abuse where an attacker requests a certificate from a vulnerable template that allows enrollee-supplied subject and uses an alternate UPN (SAN) to impersonate a privileged account. Certipy and Certify expose this via the 'req' action with -upn/-template/-altname. In GOAD this is run against the ESC1 template on the CA to impersonate a Domain Admin.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*certipy*' or 'Command Line' like '*Certify.exe*' or 'Command Line' like '*Certify *')) and (('Command Line' like '*req*' or 'Command Line' like '*request*')) and (('Command Line' like '*-upn*' or 'Command Line' like '*/altname*' or 'Command Line' like '*-altname*' or 'Command Line' like '*subject*' or 'Command Line' like '*-sid*')))
